mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inquiries (user_id, name, phone, email, category, title, content, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{req.name}, #{req.phone}, #{req.email}, #{req.category}, #{req.title}, #{req.content}, 'NEW', NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM inquiries WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE inquiries SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE inquiry_id = #{inquiryId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inquiries WHERE status = 'NEW'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inquiries WHERE status = 'COMPLETED'
SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS count FROM inquiries GROUP BY category ORDER BY count DESC
